pi_items.source: Task setup script confirms this is the expected deployment location for Chinook SQLite database in the DBeaver environment.
Task description and export_result.sh script specify this path for the CSV export.
Task description and setup_task.sh script specify this path for SQL DDL/DML script.
Direct query of Chinook invoices table confirms both USA and Canada are present with 91 and 56 invoices respectively.
Direct query of Chinook invoices table confirms all three countries are present with 35, 7, and 7 invoices respectively.
Direct query of Chinook invoices table confirms both countries are present with 7 and 13 invoices respectively.
Direct query of Chinook invoices table confirms all 17 EMEA countries are present in the database. Total invoice count across all regions: 412 (24 distinct countries).
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT BillingCountry) FROM invoices returns 24. All 24 distinct countries have explicit mappings in the metadata rules (no 'Other' countries needed).
SQL aggregation of invoices by region using metadata mapping rules: USA (91 invoices, 523.06) + Canada (56 invoices, 303.96) = 147 invoices, 827.02 total revenue
SQL aggregation: Brazil (35, 190.1) + Chile (7, 46.62) + Argentina (7, 37.62) = 49 invoices, 274.34 total revenue
SQL aggregation: Australia (7, 37.62) + India (13, 75.26) = 20 invoices, 112.88 total revenue
SQL aggregation: 17 EMEA countries totaling 196 invoices and 1114.36 revenue. France (35, 195.1), Germany (28, 156.48), United Kingdom (21, 112.86) are top EMEA countries.
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices returns 412 total invoices. Sum of regional invoices: NA (147) + LATAM (49) + APAC (20) + EMEA (196) = 412
SELECT SUM(Total) FROM invoices returns 2328.6. Sum of regional revenue: 827.02 + 274.34 + 112.88 + 1114.36 = 2328.60

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real publicly available sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database containing 412 invoices across 24 distinct billing countries. All metadata mapping rules are verified correct: NA covers USA (91 invoices) and Canada (56); LATAM covers Brazil (35), Chile (7), Argentina (7); APAC covers Australia (7) and India (13); EMEA covers 17 European/Middle Eastern/African countries totaling 196 invoices. Expected regional revenues are: NA=$827.02, LATAM=$274.34, APAC=$112.88, EMEA=$1114.36, Total=$2328.60. All 24 distinct countries have explicit mappings with no unmapped 'Other' countries. Media data derives from real iTunes library; customer and sales data are artificially generated.
